cookies.title: Session Cookies (JSON)
cookies.description: Your session cookies exported from Chrome after logging in via Google. Use the 'Cookie-Editor' extension → Export → JSON. Paste the full JSON array here.

targetDays.title: Days to book
targetDays.description: Days of the week to monitor. Valid values: Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, Friday, Saturday, Sunday.

targetTimes.title: Times to book
targetTimes.description: Start times to monitor in HH:MM format, e.g. 18:00. Add each time slot you want to book.

instructors.title: Instructors (optional)
instructors.description: Only book classes with these instructors. Leave empty to accept any. Available: Anna Hrubošová, Kateřina Krajcarová, Kateřina Opelková, Lenka Šlaufová, Lucie Březíková, Lucie Šenkýřová, Sabina Poislová.

classTypes.title: Class types (optional)
classTypes.description: Only book these class types. Leave empty to accept any. Available: Individuální lekce, Individuální lekce 2 jezdci, Individuální lekce začátečník, Individuální skoková lekce 2 jezdci, Skupinová lekce, Skupinová lekce – děti začátečníci, Stájník.

bookingUrl.title: Booking URL
bookingUrl.description: Base URL of the booking system.

minDaysAhead.title: Minimum days ahead
minDaysAhead.description: Never book a class starting sooner than this many days from today. Protects against accidentally booking something this week.

dryRun.title: Dry run (no actual booking)
dryRun.description: Check for available classes but do NOT book them. Use this for testing.
